title: centaurea lycia
intro: Centaurea lycia, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea lycia include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Centaurea lycia include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
